title: Raven fingerprint descriptor (v1)
description: Frozen v1 profile-descriptor contract (Plan 02 ratified design, §6 D1). JSON keys mirror the JS-observable names exactly. Identity axes (os, platform, gpu, screen, languages, locale, timezone, hardwareConcurrency, deviceMemory, chromeMajor) are read verbatim by the C++ Profile and the Raven-Browser writer; the seed drives only within-profile jitter and never an identity axis. schemaVersion is pinned to an accepted range by both this schema and the C++ parser; an unknown major is a hard fail. Post-v1 surfaces ADD fields under the optional 'extensions' block; frozen names are never renamed.

schemaVersion.title: Descriptor schema version
schemaVersion.description: Contract major version. Pinned to 1 for v1; an unknown major is a hard fail in both validate.py and the C++ parser.

seed.title: Per-profile PRNG seed
seed.description: Fixed 64-bit seed that drives ONLY within-profile jitter (canvas LSB noise, audio fudge, integer offsets) via the SipHash+randen chain. Never an identity axis. Accepts a JSON number or a decimal string, because a u64 can exceed the JS safe-integer range.

os.title: Host operating-system family
os.description: Governs the platform string and the plausible GPU set. v1 personas are host-OS/GPU-matched (no cross-OS personas).

platform.title: navigator.platform
platform.description: Exact navigator.platform string. windows => 'Win32', macos => 'MacIntel' (even on Apple Silicon — Chrome never reports an 'arm' platform), linux => 'Linux x86_64'. Must agree with os.

chromeMajor.title: Chrome milestone (major version)
chromeMajor.description: Feeds the UA string and Sec-CH-UA. Sane band: >= 140.

hardwareConcurrency.title: navigator.hardwareConcurrency
hardwareConcurrency.description: Logical CPU count reported to JS. Realistic, even, within [2, 256] (coherence-checked).

deviceMemory.title: navigator.deviceMemory (GiB)
deviceMemory.description: Approximate device RAM. Web-spec bucket set {0.25,0.5,1,2,4,8}; note Blink's ApproximatedDeviceMemory clamps navigator.deviceMemory to a maximum of 8, so realistic v1 personas use 4 or 8.

gpu.title: GPU identity (WebGL + WebGPU)
gpu.description: Unmasked WebGL vendor/renderer plus WebGPU adapter info. Strings must be plausible for os (no Apple GPU off macOS, no Direct3D off Windows, no Mesa off Linux, no Metal off macOS).

renderer.title: WEBGL_debug_renderer_info UNMASKED_RENDERER_WEBGL
renderer.description: Full ANGLE renderer string, e.g. 'ANGLE (NVIDIA, NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3070 ... Direct3D11 ..., D3D11)'.

device.title: WebGPU GPUAdapterInfo.device
device.description: Adapter device string, e.g. 'NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3070'.

screen.title: Screen geometry (window.screen)
screen.description: availW <= w and availH <= h; colorDepth == pixelDepth in {24,30}; dpr in a sane set (coherence-checked).

languages.title: navigator.languages
languages.description: Ordered BCP-47 tags. languages[0] is the single source for Accept-Language and must share locale's primary language subtag (co-variation; never re-derived from the seed).

locale.title: Default locale
locale.description: BCP-47 language-REGION default (e.g. 'en-US'). Its region must be plausible for timezone.

timezone.title: IANA time-zone name
timezone.description: IANA tz-database name (e.g. 'America/New_York'). Single source for geo/tz; must be plausible for locale's region.

extensions.title: Forward-compatibility block (optional)
extensions.description: Optional open object for post-v1 additive fields (Plan 03+). Ignored by the v1 parser; keeps top-level additionalProperties:false while allowing the contract to grow without renames.
